title: The Null
description: The Null is an mod im working experimental wise... horror elements and stuff like that, by itself its not necessarily a horror mod but more like an addon to other horror mods to more immerse yourself in a scary experience
body:
[![The Null Mod](https://i.imgur.com/Kah3axR.png)](https://minecraftstorage.com/mods/the-null)


+ **What dose this mod add** -

A Dimesion called the null that slowly corrupts the cover world, A Herobrine like mob called the nulloid that will watch you in any dimesion and if you let it watch you for to long a suprise might happen...

+ **Why our mod?** -

_Monthly updates, discord community and other additions such as voted in features and collabs_

+ **Other things before you download** -

This mod is in very early alpha so do consider things might go wrong this isnt a stand alone horror mod yet

There is also no way to back to the overworld you will be soft locked in the dimesion!

[![Join My Discord](https://i.imgur.com/4ocuGQB.png)](https://discord.gg/3qCU9bGPmt)
[![Visit My YouTube](https://i.imgur.com/4vYrWcC.png)](https://www.youtube.com/@SimplyMelonHaverMC)
